name: Marriott Bonvoy Brilliant® American Express® Card

welcome_offer.description: Earn 200,000 Marriott Bonvoy bonus points after you use your new Card to make $6,000 in purchases within the first 6 months of Card Membership. Offer ends 5/13/2026.

earning_rates.notes: 6x per $1 on eligible purchases at hotels participating in Marriott Bonvoy

annual_credits.name: Free Night Award
annual_credits.description: 1 Free Night Award each year after card account anniversary. Award can be used at participating Marriott Bonvoy properties with a redemption level at or under 85,000 points.

annual_credits.name: Marriott Bonvoy Instant Elite Nights
annual_credits.description: 25 Elite Night Credits each year (counts toward lifetime status)

lounge_access.other: Priority Pass Select lounge access (enrollment required)

hotel_status.method: Automatic for as long as card is open

other_benefits: $300 Marriott Bonvoy statement credit (credit up to $300 in eligible charges at Marriott Bonvoy properties annually)
Priority Pass Select lounge access (enrollment required)
Premium Internet access at Marriott hotels
